name: faq_shipping_returns_8_pages_help

observed_strengths.observation: 'STAY BOLD, STAY CAFFEINATED. SIGN UP AND SAVE 20% OFF YOUR FIRST ORDER' email capture H2 on FAQ page — email acquisition opportunity at a high-intent trust-building page

FAQ exists at /pages/help with structured sections (GENERAL, CONTACT US, TERMS AND CONDITIONS, PRIVACY POLICY, UNAUTHORIZED SELLER INFO, HOW SAFE IS IT TO ORDER ONLINE) — pre-purchase trust questions addressed

missing_or_weak.observation: FAQ at non-standard URL /pages/help instead of /pages/faq — standard URL /pages/faq is in rejected pages (quota_exceeded), not confirmed as working or 404

purchase_path_notes: FAQ is functional and addresses key pre-purchase concerns. The email capture on this page captures high-intent visitors who are in 'research mode' before first purchase.
